args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: Hono, HonoOptions, Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler from ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
- Safe summary: Factory helper creates Hono app instances and handler arrays. Supports 1-10 handlers with merged env types.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT from '../../request/constants', RouterRoute from '../../types', getPattern, splitRoutingPath from '../../utils/url'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
- Safe summary: Retrieves matched route data from context. Returns route path, base path, and matched handlers.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, createWSMessageEvent
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse from '../../types', StatusCode from '../../utils/http-status'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
- Safe summary: Defines WebSocket upgrade handlers with event listeners (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError).

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned from '../../utils/cookie', Cookie types from '../../utils/cookie'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Reads, sets, and deletes HTTP cookies. Supports signed cookies and secure/__Host- cookie prefixes.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: hc from '../../client', Client from '../../client/types', ExecutionContext from '../../context', Hono from '../../hono', Schema from '../../types', UnionToIntersection from '../../utils/types'
- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../client/types, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
- Safe summary: Creates test HTTP client for Hono apps. Wraps app.request() as custom fetch implementation.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime type
- Reads as: Context from '../../context'
- Neighbor files: ../../context
- Safe summary: Detects execution runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light) and accesses environment variables.

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: raw from '../../helper/html', DOM_RENDERER from '../../jsx/constants', createCssJsxDomObjects from '../../jsx/dom/css', HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString from '../../utils/html', common exports from './common'
- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
- Safe summary: Server-side CSS-in-JS helper. Generates unique class names, injects styles, supports keyframes and view transitions.

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify, toHash, rawCssString, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
- Reads as: No external dependencies
- Neighbor files: ../../helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: Shared CSS utility functions. Builds style strings, generates class name hashes, minifies CSS.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: HTTPException from '../../http-exception', RequestHeader from '../../utils/headers'
- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper. Strips hop-by-hop headers, supports custom fetch, optional RFC 9110 Connection header validation.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Hono from '../../hono', Env, RouterRoute from '../../types', getColorEnabled from '../../utils/color', findTargetHandler, isMiddleware from '../../utils/handler'
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
- Safe summary: Developer helpers. Lists registered routes with method, path, and handler name. Optional verbose/color output.

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString from '../../utils/html', HtmlEscaped, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks from '../../utils/html'
- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
- Safe summary: Renders HTML strings with automatic escaping. Supports callbacks for async content, Promise resolution.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: exports from './ssg', ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG from './middleware', defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin from './plugins'
- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
- Safe summary: Static site generation helper. Fetches routes, writes files to filesystem. Includes middleware for dynamic route params.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, BeforeRequestHook, AfterResponseHook, AfterGenerateHook
- Reads as: replaceUrlParam from '../../client/utils', Hono from '../../hono', Env, Schema from '../../types', createPool from '../../utils/concurrent', getExtension from '../../utils/mime', defaultExtensionMap, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY from './middleware', defaultPlugin from './plugins', dirname, ensureWithinOutDir, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths from './utils'
- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation. Fetches all static routes in parallel, generates file paths by MIME type, writes to filesystem.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Hono from '../../hono', METHOD_NAME_ALL from '../../router', Env, RouterRoute from '../../types', findTargetHandler, isMiddleware from '../../utils/handler'
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
- Safe summary: Path utilities for SSG. Normalizes paths, joins segments, filters GET-only handlers, detects dynamic routes with :param or *.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSGParamsMiddleware, SSGParams, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', Env, MiddlewareHandler from '../../types', isDynamicRoute from './utils'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSG middleware. Adds ssgParams array to dynamic routes, detects SSG context, prevents/forces SSG responses.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: stream from './stream', SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi from './sse', streamText from './text'
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
- Safe summary: Streaming helpers. Exports stream (binary), streamSSE (Server-Sent Events), streamText (text/plain chunks).

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', StreamingApi from '../../utils/stream', isOldBunVersion from './utils'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: Binary streaming helper. Creates TransformStream, holds context until streaming completes, aborts on request cancel.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback from '../../utils/html', StreamingApi from '../../utils/stream', isOldBunVersion from './utils'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper. Writes data: lines with event/id/retry fields. Sets Transfer-Encoding: chunked, Content-Type: text/event-stream.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', TEXT_PLAIN from '../../context', StreamingApi from '../../utils/stream', stream from './'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, .
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper. Sets Content-Type to text/plain, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Transfer-Encoding: chunked headers.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: accepts from './accepts'
- Neighbor files: ./accepts
- Safe summary: Accept header helper. Re-export from accepts.ts.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions
- Reads as: Context from '../../context', parseAccept from '../../utils/accept', AcceptHeader from '../../utils/headers'
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: Parses Accept headers and returns best match. Sorts by q value, supports custom match function, provides fallback default.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: types exports from './types'
- Neighbor files: ./types
- Safe summary: Connection info helper. Re-export of ConnInfo types.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Context from '../../context'
- Neighbor files: ../../context
- Safe summary: Defines ConnInfo type structure. Contains remote address, port, transport protocol, and address type (IPv4/IPv6).
